summary: Tested new Family Wealth Dashboard feature at /family-wealth. All 15 features working correctly. Dashboard consolidates family financial data including combined wealth (~$3.27M net worth), tax savings ($53K annual), and inter-generational wealth transfer planning.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) during initial render - minor issue, charts render correctly after brief delay

passed_tests: Summary cards show: Total Net Worth ($3,272,270), Total Assets ($4,214,270), Total Debt ($942,000), Annual Tax Savings ($53,505), Total Super ($600,000)
Combined Wealth tab shows wealth composition pie chart (Property Equity, Shares, Superannuation, Cash & TD, Trust Assets, Company)
Combined Wealth tab shows wealth by family member bar chart (James, Sarah, Emily, Michael Wheeler)
Combined Wealth tab shows wealth projection over time with configurable 10/20/30 years dropdown
Combined Wealth tab shows clickable member list linking to profiles (/family-member/:id)
Tax Savings tab shows total annual tax savings ($53,505) with breakdown bar chart
Tax Savings tab shows active tax strategies: Income Splitting ($22,473), Trust Distributions ($22,500), Super Contributions ($1,249), Franking Credits ($2,311), Negative Gearing ($4,972)
Wealth Transfer tab shows estate summary: Current Value ($3,872,270), Projected at Age 85 ($44,406,592), Years to Transfer (40), Per Beneficiary ($22,203,296)
Wealth Transfer tab has Estate Transfer Age slider (70-100, default 85)
Wealth Transfer tab has Annual Gifting slider ($0-$100,000)
Wealth Transfer tab shows wealth transfer strategies with priority badges (High, Medium, Long-term, Essential)
Wealth Transfer tab shows next generation beneficiaries (Emily Wheeler Age 22, Michael Wheeler Age 19) with estimated inheritance
Navigation sidebar shows 'Wealth Dashboard' under Overview section with correct highlighting
Related Pages links work correctly (Tax Analysis, Trust Analysis, Scenario Modeling, SG Calculator, Export Data)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render - ChartContainer component exists but warnings still appear briefly. Not blocking functionality.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses localStorage and default values from App.js PortfolioContext
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested Family Wealth Dashboard at /family-wealth. All 3 tabs (Combined Wealth, Tax Savings, Wealth Transfer) work correctly. Projection years dropdown (10/20/30) works. Sliders for Estate Transfer Age and Annual Gifting work. Family member links navigate to profile pages. Related Pages links work. Data comes from global PortfolioContext (MOCKED - frontend only, stored in localStorage).

components: Header with title, subtitle, and family members badge
Summary cards (Net Worth, Assets, Debt, Tax Savings, Super)
Combined Wealth tab with pie chart, bar chart, projection chart, member list
Tax Savings tab with total savings card, breakdown chart, active strategies list
Wealth Transfer tab with estate summary, sliders, strategies, beneficiaries
Related Pages section with 5 navigation links
Sidebar shows Wealth Dashboard under Overview section
Family member links navigate to profile pages
Tab switching (Combined Wealth, Tax Savings, Wealth Transfer)

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - stored in React Context and localStorage. No backend database connection. Wheeler Family with ~$3.27M net worth, $53K annual tax savings.
